_doc: KrutiDev-010 → Unicode Devanagari mapping table.
KrutiDev is a Remington-layout font: the font makes ASCII bytes LOOK like
Devanagari on screen. When a PDF is extracted, you get the raw ASCII bytes.
This file tells the converter what each byte (or byte sequence) actually means.
VERIFIED entries are confirmed from the known example:
'MhvkjMhvks lekpkj'  →  'डीआरडीओ समाचार'
UNVERIFIED entries are derived from Remington Hindi keyboard layout
documentation and common KrutiDev-010 reference tables. Correct them as
you extract real text from your PDFs.
HOW THE CONVERTER USES THIS FILE:
1. Tries 'conjuncts' first (longest match, checked left-to-right).
2. Handles the i-matra reversal (see 'i_matra' section).
3. Falls back to 'direct' for remaining single chars.
EDITING TIPS:
- Keys are the literal ASCII chars from your extracted text.
- Values are Unicode strings (may be multiple codepoints).
- Add new conjuncts when you find multi-char sequences that map to a
single Devanagari unit (common for standalone vowels and some conjuncts).
- The 'verified' boolean is just for your reference; the converter ignores it.
Multi-char ASCII sequences → Unicode. Checked BEFORE single-char substitution.
IMPORTANT: The converter tries longer keys before shorter keys so that e.g.
'vks' is matched before 'vk' is matched. Keep this file sorted by length desc
within each group if you add entries manually.
Standalone vowel forms: in KrutiDev, standalone vowels (आ, ओ, औ etc.) are
composed from multiple glyph keystrokes that visually merge into one character.
The PDF extractor sees the raw keystrokes; we must map the sequence to the
single Unicode codepoint.
Conjunct consonants: some consonant clusters (क्ष, ज्ञ, त्र) have a single
KrutiDev glyph sequence that must be translated to the Unicode ZWJ/virama form.

entries.note: standalone AU vowel (ā + AI matra). UNVERIFIED.
standalone O vowel. VERIFIED from example: MhvkjMhvks→डीआरडीओ
standalone AA vowel. VERIFIED from example: vkj→आर
ksha conjunct. VERIFIED from j{kk=रक्षा (p7).
pra ligature (प्र, U+00E7 Latin c-cedilla used as KrutiDev glyph). VERIFIED from ç.kkyh=प्रणाली, çkS|ksfxfd;k¡=प्रौद्योगिकियाँ (p7/p10).
kha (ख). VERIFIED from çeq[k=प्रमुख (p7: [k is a 2-char sequence → single ख).
o matra (ो). VERIFIED from dks=को (appears throughout p7/p10). k alone=ā, ks together=ो.
standalone AI vowel (ऐ). VERIFIED from ,sfrgkfld=ऐतिहासिक (p10). ',' alone=ए, but ',s' together=ऐ.
standalone II (long i) vowel. UNVERIFIED.
AU matra (after consonant). UNVERIFIED.
ṇa retroflex (ण). VERIFIED from ç.kkyh=प्रणाली (system), ç{ksi.k=प्रक्षेपण (p7 title).

sha-retroflex plain ष (U+0937) when the " glyph is followed by artifact-k. VERIFIED from fo"k;d=विषयक, fo'ks"kKrk=विशेषज्ञता, fo'ks"krk=विशेषता (p7/p10). When " appears before a real consonant cluster (Ø,V,B) there is NO artifact-k and the direct " -> ष् (half-form) handles it correctly. This 2-char conjunct fires first and prevents the artifact-k producing spurious ā matra.

sha+halant+va cluster (श्व). VERIFIED from fo'ofo|ky;=विश्वविद्यालय (p8: fo=वि, 'o=श्व, fo=वि, |=द्य, k=ā, y=ल, ;=य). Without conjunct '->श, o->व gives शव (no halant). Follows pattern of 'p->श्च, 'y->श्ल.

dha+halant+ya cluster (ध्य). VERIFIED from ek/;e=माध्यम (p8: e=म, k=ā, /;=ध्य, e=म → माध्यम). '/' is in artifact_k_chars but artifact suppression only fires when next char is 'k'; here next is ';' so conjunct takes priority at Step 1.

i-matra on 2-char conjunct ण (f=i-matra, .k=ण). VERIFIED from 'kS{kf.kd=शैक्षणिक (p8). The i-matra while-loop only peeks single chars, so can't handle .k (2-char) as a conjunct host — this 3-char conjunct fires at Step 1 first.
sha+halant+la cluster (श्ल). VERIFIED from fo'ys"k.k=विश्लेषण (p8: fo=वि, 'y=श्ल, s=े, "k=ष, .k=ण → विश्लेषण). ' alone -> श, y alone -> ल; without conjunct gives शल (no halant).
chandra-O matra (ॉ, composed glyph). VERIFIED from MkW=डॉ (p2/p5: M=ड, kW=ॉ → डॉ for Dr.). Fires before k→ā + W→ध. Alternative single-char encoding '‚'→ॉ (U+201A) also exists in this PDF.

sha+halant+cha cluster (श्च). VERIFIED from fu'p;=निश्चय, lqfuf'pr=सुनिश्चित (p7). When ' is at current position followed by p, conjunct fires. When f (i-matra) precedes 'p, the i-matra while-loop treats ' as a half-form (श्) and binds ि to cha instead — both paths now produce correct output.

sha+halant+ya cluster (श्य). VERIFIED from ifj–';=परिदृश्य (p10). ' alone -> श (full form), so without this conjunct '; gives शय (wrong). z->्र already provides the virama for श्र naturally; this conjunct is needed because ; ->य carries no virama.

standalone ऑ vowel (U+0911, DEVANAGARI LETTER SHORT A with chandra-O). VERIFIED from v‚Vks-VªSfdax=ऑटो-ट्रैकिंग (p10: v=अ base, ‚=ॉ matra; together form ऑ not अ+ॉ separately). Used in English loanwords. ‚ alone (U+201A) -> ॉ matra on a consonant; v+‚ -> standalone ऑ vowel.

da+halant+ra cluster absorbing spurious trailing z (द्र). VERIFIED from ÅtZLoh inkFkZ mUur dsaæz=...केंद्र्र (p22: æ fires as द्र via direct, then z adds spurious ्र giving double). This 2-char conjunct fires at Step 1 to consume æ+z together as a single द्र. When æ appears without z, the direct æ->द्र entry still handles it correctly.

_doc: The short 'i' matra (ि, U+093F) is the most complex case in KrutiDev.
In Unicode:  consonant + ि  (e.g., क + ि = कि)
In KrutiDev: ि glyph appears BEFORE the consonant glyph, because the
i-matra's left hook must be drawn before the consonant stroke
on a typewriter. So 'fk' in KrutiDev means 'कि' in Unicode.
Reordering rule: whenever one of 'i_matra_chars' is found, consume the
NEXT character as the consonant, then output: consonant + ि
Single ASCII char → Unicode. Applied after conjuncts and i-matra handling.
Entries marked VERIFIED are confirmed from the known example or Devanagari
font documentation. Entries marked UNVERIFIED are best guesses from the
standard Remington Hindi keyboard layout used by KrutiDev.

entries.note: space
newline
carriage return
Devanagari digit 0. UNVERIFIED (may be ASCII 0).
Devanagari digit 1. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 2. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 3. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 4. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 5. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 6. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 7. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 8. UNVERIFIED.
Devanagari digit 9. UNVERIFIED.
halant/virama (् U+094D). UNVERIFIED.

danda / Hindi full stop (। U+0964). VERIFIED from laf{kIr fooj.k fn;k( = ...दिया। (p13). In KrutiDev, '(' key produces the danda glyph. True opening parenthesis is ¼ (U+00BC) — see conjuncts. Note: attribution lines start with '(' in the raw; the converter post-processing restores this to '(' in output (see converter.py).

single quote / grade-designation wrapper. VERIFIED from vSKkfud ^,Q^ = वैज्ञानिक 'एफ' (p13: KrutiDev caret wraps grade letters like F, G). Also appears as ^^ for opening double-quote in English titles. Also appears in ^^text (two carets = opening dbl-quote; Tier-3 in English spans).

halant/virama (् U+094D). VERIFIED from mn~?kkVu=उद्घाटन (p20: n+~+?k → द्+घ), ln~Hkko=सद्भाव (p15: n+~+H → द्+भ), iV~Vj=पट्टर (p2: V+~+V → ट्ट). Was wrongly ँ (chandrabindu); ¡ (U+00A1) is the VERIFIED chandrabindu.
chandrabindu (ँ U+0901) — inverted-exclamation char used in this PDF. VERIFIED from çkS|ksfxfd;k¡=प्रौद्योगिकियाँ (p7).

forward slash (/). VERIFIED from Lopkfyr@eSU;qvy=स्वचालित/मैन्युअल (p10), jMkj@IACSS=रडार/IACSS (p10). KrutiDev uses @ for the slash glyph. Anusvara is 'a' (lowercase, VERIFIED from gLrkarfjr=हस्तांतरित).
ra+short-u combined glyph (रु). VERIFIED from csaxyw#=बेंगलूरु (p2: c=ब...w=ू, #=रु), :id c#vk=रूपक बरुआ (p2: #=रु → बरुआ). Previously guessed as ः (visarga, UNVERIFIED — now known wrong).
da+halant+ya conjunct (द्य). VERIFIED from m|ksxksa=उद्योगों, çkS|ksfxfd;k¡=प्रौद्योगिकियाँ (p7).

reph (र् = ra+halant superscript). VERIFIED from vkRefuHkZjrk=आत्मनिर्भरता, dk;ZØe=कार्यक्रम (p7). NOTE: In KrutiDev, reph is typed AFTER its host consonant; Unicode needs it before — position reordering not yet implemented.
anusvara (ं U+0902). VERIFIED from gLrkarfjr=हस्तांतरित (p7).
danda — Hindi full stop (।). VERIFIED from sentence-final A in p7 (çnku djrk gSA=प्रदान करता है।).
standalone i vowel (इ). VERIFIED from felkby=मिसाइल (p7).
ṭha retroflex (ठ). VERIFIED from çfr"Bku=प्रतिष्ठान (p10: institution). H→भ is the correct bha; B was wrongly set to भ.
ba (ब). VERIFIED from gSnjkckn=हैदराबाद (p7).
ba+halant cluster-start (ब्). VERIFIED from miyfC/k=उपलब्धि (p5: C=ब्, /k=ध → ब्धि). N is the correct छ. P→च् handles cha+halant (from mPp=उच्च).
ka (क). UNVERIFIED (Remington layout: 'k' matra, 'd' consonant ka).
ka+halant cluster-start (क्). VERIFIED from ÝSDpj=फ्रैक्चर (p7: D=क्, p=च → क्चर) and vDrwcj=अक्तूबर (D=क् → अक्तूबर). Previously wrongly set to ड; M is the verified ड glyph (from yM+dk=लड़का).
ma (म). VERIFIED from example: 'lekpkj'→'समाचार'

ma+halant cluster-start (म्). VERIFIED from lEesyu=सम्मेलन (p25: l=स, E=म्, e=म, s=े, y=ल, u=न → सम्मेलन), lEekfur=सम्मानित (p25). Standalone ए is encoded as ',' (VERIFIED from ,oa=एवं). Prior wrong guess: E=ए (UNVERIFIED).
short i matra (ि) — REVERSED in KrutiDev. Handled by i-matra rule; this entry is fallback only.
tha (थ). VERIFIED from rFkk=तथा (p7), fLFkr=स्थित.
ha (ह). VERIFIED from gSnjkckn=हैदराबाद, gLrkarfjr=हस्तांतरित (p7).
gha (घ). UNVERIFIED.
long ī matra (ी). VERIFIED from example: 'Mh'→'डी'
bha (भ). VERIFIED from Hkkxhnkjksa=भागीदारों, vkRefuHkZjrk=आत्मनिर्भरता (p7).
pa (प). VERIFIED from ç{ksi.k=प्रक्षेपण (b=standalone इ, i=प consonant).
pa+halant cluster-start (प्). VERIFIED from IysVksa=प्लेटों (p7: I=प्, y=ल, s=े, V=ट, ksa=ों).
ra (र). VERIFIED from example: 'lekpkj'→'समाचार'
sha+halant+ra combined glyph (श्र, Shree cluster). VERIFIED from Jh=श्री, Jherh=श्रीमती, Js.kh=श्रेणी (p2/p5). '>' is the correct झ (VERIFIED from le>kSrk=समझौता). Analogous to ç→प्र, Ý→फ्र.
ā matra (ा U+093E). VERIFIED from example: 'k' appears at matra positions in 'lekpkj'→'समाचार'
jnya conjunct (ज्ञ). VERIFIED from Kkiu=ज्ञापन, le>kSrk Kkiu=समझौता ज्ञापन (p7). NOTE: ख (kha) is now conjunct '[k'.
sa (स). VERIFIED from example: 'lekpkj'→'समाचार'
sa+halant cluster-start (स्). VERIFIED from gLrkarfjr=हस्तांतरित, LVhy=स्टील (p7).
standalone u vowel (उ). VERIFIED from mPp=उच्च, us m|ksxksa=ने उद्योगों (p7).
ḍa retroflex (ड). VERIFIED from example: 'Mh'→'डी'
da dental (द). VERIFIED from gSnjkckn=हैदराबाद (p7).
cha aspirate (छ). VERIFIED from Nk=ksa=छात्रों (p8). '.k' (2-char conjunct) remains the correct encoding for ण retroflex in conjunct clusters. C is the correct ब्.
va (व). VERIFIED from lfpo=सचिव, Lopkfyr=स्वचालित (p7/p10). NOTE: ो matra is now conjunct 'ks'.
va+halant cluster-start (व्). VERIFIED from O;kogkfjd=व्यावहारिक (p8: O=व्, ;=य → व्य). Standalone ओ is already correctly handled by conjunct 'vks'→ओ.
ca (च). VERIFIED from example: 'lekpkj'→'समाचार' at position 4
cha+halant cluster-start (च्). VERIFIED from mPp=उच्च (p7). NOTE: छ (aspirated cha) stays on 'C'.
short u matra (ु). UNVERIFIED.
pha (फ). VERIFIED from VQusl=टफनेस (Toughness, p7). NOTE: was wrongly set to ठ; B is the correct ठ.
ta dental (त). UNVERIFIED.
ta+halant cluster-start (त्). VERIFIED from vkRefuHkZjrk=आत्मनिर्भरता (R is half-ta before ma). NOTE: ृ matra was wrong.
e matra (े). UNVERIFIED — supported by conjunct: vks→ओ uses s as final component.
ai matra (ै). UNVERIFIED.
ja (ज). VERIFIED from ftrsUnz=जितेन्द्र (p2), ÅtZLoh=ऊर्जस्वी.

ja+halant cluster-start (ज्). VERIFIED from okf.kfT;d=वाणिज्यिक (p7: T=ज्, ;=य → ज्य), jkT;=राज्य, T;ksRluk=ज्योत्सना. V is the correct ट (VERIFIED from LVhy=स्टील). T was WRONGLY set to ट; both T and V cannot be ट.
na (न). VERIFIED from us=ने (p7: MhvkjMhvks us→डीआरडीओ ने).
na+halant cluster-start (न्). VERIFIED from mUur=उन्नत (p7). NOTE: ण retroflex stays on 'N'.
standalone a vowel (अ) OR base of standalone vowel sequences (vk=आ etc.). PARTIALLY VERIFIED by conjunct analysis.
ṭa retroflex (ट). VERIFIED from LVhy=स्टील, VªSfdax=ट्रैकिंग (p7/p10). NOTE: व (va) is now 'o'.
long ū matra (ू). UNVERIFIED.
dha (ध). NOTE: in conjunct 'kW' the W contributes to ॉ (see conjunct kW→ॉ). Standalone W→ध is provisionally kept; / is the VERIFIED ध glyph.
ga (ग). VERIFIED from VªSfdax=ट्रैकिंग, xfr=गति (p10). NOTE: ख (kha) stays on 'K'.
ga+halant cluster-start (ग्). VERIFIED from flXuy=सिग्नल (p5: X=ग्, u=न, y=ल → ग्नल). '{k' is the correct क्ष conjunct (VERIFIED).
la (ल). VERIFIED from jsy=रेल, felkby=मिसाइल, Lopkfyr=स्वचालित (p7/p10). NOTE: य (ya) moves to ';'.
la+halant cluster-start (ल्). VERIFIED from fnYyh=दिल्ली (p2: f+Y=ल् half-form in i-matra while loop, y=ल, h=ी), ladYi=संकल्प (p15). H is the correct भ (VERIFIED).
halant+ra cluster suffix (्र). VERIFIED from lkexzh=सामग्री (p7: x=ग, z=्र, h=ी gives ग्री).
chandra-O matra (ॉ, U+201A→U+0949). VERIFIED from M‚ lehj=डॉ समीर (p7: M=ड, ‚=ॉ gives डॉ for Dr.).
kta cluster (क्त, U+00E4). VERIFIED from 'kfä=शक्ति (p7: f+ä gives ि on क्त → क्ति).
da+vocalic-r-matra combined glyph (दृ = द+ृ, U+2013→U+0926+U+0943). VERIFIED from ifj–';=परिदृश्य (p10). KrutiDev renders दृ as a single ligature glyph at en-dash codepoint.
ka+vocalic-r-matra combined glyph (कृ = क+ृ, U+2014→U+0915+U+0943). VERIFIED from mR—"V=उत्कृष्ट (p7: R=त्, —=कृ, "V=ष्ट → उत्कृष्ट), g ,dh—r=एकीकृत (p10).
standalone long-U vowel (ऊ, U+00C5→U+090A). VERIFIED from ÅtkZ=ऊर्जा (p5: Å=ऊ, t=ज, k=ā, Z=reph → ऊर्जा). uPp=उच्च uses m=उ (short), Å is the long form.
vocalic-R matra (ृ, U+0060→U+0943). VERIFIED from Le`fr=स्मृति (p12: L=स्, e=म, `=ृ, f+r=ति → स्मृति), e`.kky=मृणाल (p2: e=म, `=ृ, .k=ण, k=ā, y=ल → मृणाल).
da+halant+da combined ligature (द्द, U+00ED). VERIFIED from mís';=उद्देश्य (p8: m=उ, í=द्द, s=े, ';=श्य → उद्देश्य). Single glyph encodes the doubled consonant cluster.
tha retroflex (ठ, U+0042→U+0920). VERIFIED from ikBîØe=पाठ्यक्रम (p25/p30: i=प, k=ā, B=ठ, î=्य, Ø=क्र, e=म → पाठ्यक्रम). Uppercase B distinct from lowercase b (=ब).

halant+ya virama-ya suffix (्य, U+00EE→U+094D+U+092F). VERIFIED from BîØe=ठ्यक्रम in ikBîØe=पाठ्यक्रम (p25). î attaches to preceding consonant via halant, like ý-type diacritic glyphs. Gives correct ठ्य, त्य etc. clusters.
ha+halant+ma combined glyph (ह्म, U+00E3). VERIFIED from czãkaM=ब्रह्मांड (p3/p15: c=ब, z=्र, ã=ह्म, k=ā, a=ं, M=ड → ब्रह्मांड) and czãksl=ब्रह्मोस (p15: Brahmos missile).
ha+halant+na combined glyph (ह्न, U+00E0). VERIFIED from fpfàr=चिह्नित (p15: fp=चि, f+à=ह्नि (i-matra on à=ह्न), r=त → चिह्नित). Single glyph encodes the hn cluster.

dha (ध, U+00E8). VERIFIED from vuqlaèkku=अनुसंधान (p2: è=ध). Alternative encoding; '/' is the primary dha glyph (VERIFIED from many corpus words). Both appear in this PDF, possibly from different text spans.
da+halant+ra combined glyph (द्र, U+00E6). VERIFIED from dsaæ=केंद्र (p15: d=क, s=े, a=ं, æ=द्र → केंद्र). Alternative to dsanz (d=क...n=द+Z=reph); both encodings appear in this PDF.

standalone vocalic-R vowel (ऋ, U+005F→U+090B). VERIFIED from _rqjkt=ऋतुराज (p15: _=ऋ, r=त, q=ु, j=र, k=ā, t=ज → ऋतुराज). Distinct from ` (U+0060)→ृ which is the vocalic-R MATRA applied to a consonant.
pha+halant (फ्, half-pha cluster-start, U+00B6). VERIFIED from ¶ys;j=फ्लेयर (p5: ¶=फ्, y=ल, s=े, ;=य, j=र → फ्लेयर). NOT फ्ल — that would double the ल because y→ल follows separately.
pha+halant+ra combined glyph (फ्र, U+00DD). VERIFIED from ÝSDpj=फ्रैक्चर (p7: Ý=फ्र, S=ै, D=क्, p=च, j=र → फ्रैक्चर). Analogous to ç→प्र (U+00E7=pra).
kra conjunct (क्र, U+00D8). VERIFIED from dk;ZØe=कार्यक्रम (p10).
double-ta cluster (त्त, U+00D9). VERIFIED from xq.koÙkk=गुणवत्ता (p10: Ù=त्त gives tat cluster).
halant+ra suffix for consonant clusters (्र, U+00AA). VERIFIED from VªSfdax=ट्रैकिंग (p10: V=ट, ª=्र gives ट्र).
da+halant+va conjunct (द्व, U+007D). VERIFIED from }kjk=द्वारा (p10).
standalone e vowel (ए). VERIFIED from fy,=लिए, ,oa=एवं (p7/p10). NOTE: actual commas in abbreviations will be converted too — known limitation.
period — pass through (some contexts use ।)
hyphen — pass through
hyphen (-). VERIFIED from cgq&fo"k;d=बहु-विषयक (p7: multi-disciplinary) and vkdk'k&NG=आकाश-NG (p10). KrutiDev uses & for the hyphen glyph; literal & (ampersand) appears to be absent from this corpus.
jha (झ). VERIFIED from le>kSrk=समझौता (p7).

gha (घ). VERIFIED from hj ?kj=हर घर (p15: ?k=घर). NOTE: actual Hindi question marks also use this codepoint; genuine ? will convert to घ (acceptable trade-off for this corpus where ? rarely appears as question mark in running text).
colon (:). VERIFIED from çdkj gSa%=प्रकार हैं: and ijh{k.k%=परीक्षण: (p7/p10). KrutiDev uses % for colon.
opening paren (U+00BC→U+0028). VERIFIED from ¼Mh,evkj,y½=डीएमआरएल (p7). KrutiDev uses ¼½ as standard parens.
closing paren (U+00BD→U+0029). VERIFIED from ¼Mh,evkj,y½=डीएमआरएल (p7).
ksha+halant (क्ष्) for pre-ya clusters. VERIFIED from y{;=लक्ष्य (p10). NOTE: 2-char conjunct '{k'→क्ष takes priority when followed by k.

tra cluster (त्र). VERIFIED from ;a==यंत्र (p10: ;=य, a=ं, ==त्र), ra==तंत्र, ea=ky;=मंत्रालय. NOTE: f= (i-matra before =) is handled by the i-matra step naturally (emits त्र+ि); no separate f= conjunct needed. =k conjunct takes priority when k follows.
kha+halant (ख्, half-form) when [ appears without following k. VERIFIED from eq[;=मुख्य (p10: e=म, q=ु, [=ख्, ;=य → मुख्य). Conjunct '[k'→ख fires first when k follows.
dha retroflex (ढ, U+003C→U+0922). VERIFIED from ih<+h=पीढ़ी (p10: i=प, h=ी, <=ढ, +=़, h=ी → पीढ़ी). Always followed by + (nukta) in this corpus.
nukta (़, U+002B→U+093C DEVANAGARI SIGN NUKTA). VERIFIED from ih<+h=पीढ़ी (p10). Combines with preceding ढ to give ढ़, or with ड to give ड़.
opening paren — pass through (ASCII open-paren in structural context; KrutiDev open-paren is ¼)

da+halant+dha conjunct (द्ध, ASCII close-paren U+0029). VERIFIED from çfrc)rk=प्रतिबद्धता (p7: c=ब, )=द्ध, r=त), ifj'kq)rk=परिशुद्धता (p10). KrutiDev uses ) for द्ध; the actual close-paren is ½ (U+00BD).
comma (,). VERIFIED from M‚ lehj oh dker] lfpo]=डॉ समीर वी कामत, सचिव, (p7). KrutiDev uses ] for comma; ASCII comma → ए (standalone e vowel).
sha (श). VERIFIED from 'kkyk='ाला in çkS|ksfxfd;k¡=प्रौद्योगिकियाँ context, 'kfä=शक्ति (p7).
sha-retroflex+halant cluster-start (ष्, U+0937+U+094D). VERIFIED from fuf"Ø;=निष्क्रिय, fof'k"V=विशिष्ट, iqf"V=पुष्टि (p10).
ra+long-u (रू). VERIFIED from :i ls=रूप से (p10: Lopkfyr :i=स्वचालित रूप).
ya (य). VERIFIED from ;g=यह (p7) and ;ksxnku=योगदान patterns. y key moved to ल.
dha (ध). VERIFIED from /kkrqdeZ=धातुकर्म (Hyderabad Defense Metallurgy Research Lab, p7).
backslash — pass through
